name: Domain Purchase
description: Detects domain purchase activities, which may indicate preparation for malicious activities like phishing campaigns.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the domain purchase event.

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: The name of the domain that was purchased.

parameters.name: registrar
parameters.description: The domain registrar through which the domain was purchased.

parameters.name: purchaser_email
parameters.description: The email address associated with the domain purchaser.

parameters.name: registration_date
parameters.description: The official registration date of the domain.
